statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: This record is cross-layer verified and also aligned with a shipped one-click surface.

links.title: WindowsDefenderSecurityCenter.admx enhanced notifications policy
links.summary: Local ADMX notes show Notifications_DisableEnhancedNotifications under HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\Notifications with enabled value 1 and disabled value 0.

links.title: WindowsDefender.admx reporting enhanced notifications policy
links.summary: Local ADMX notes also show Reporting_DisableEnhancedNotifications under HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Reporting with enabled value 1 and disabled value 0.

links.title: Win25H2Clean Procmon baseline for Security Center notifications policy
links.summary: On a clean snapshot, SecurityHealthService.exe queried HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\Notifications\DisableEnhancedNotifications and got NAME NOT FOUND. The same capture showed DisableNotifications = 1 already present on that branch.

links.title: Win25H2Clean Procmon enabled-state read for Security Center notifications policy
links.summary: After writing DisableEnhancedNotifications = 1 on the Security Center Notifications policy path, SecurityHealthService.exe queried the same path and read Data: 1.

links.title: Win25H2Clean Procmon reporting-path alias check
links.summary: When only HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Reporting\DisableEnhancedNotifications was set to 1, the Windows Security launch probe still showed SecurityHealthService.exe querying the Security Center Notifications policy path. This capture did not show a matching read from the Reporting path.

links.title: Current security provider enhanced notifications write
links.summary: The app writes HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\Notifications\DisableEnhancedNotifications = 1.
